results.title: Pernod Ricard loses Delhi court battle to resume liquor sales in national capital
results.description: A Delhi court has rejected Pernod Ricard’s plea seeking permission to sell its products in New Delhi, dealing a fresh blow to the French liquor giant that has been locked out of the capital since 2023.

results.title: Top 10 Digital Identity Wallets: Features, Pros, Cons & Comparison
results.description: Introduction Digital Identity Wallets allow individuals and organizations to securely store, manage, verify, and share digital identity credentials using mobile [...]

results.title: Santos dismiss lack of transparency over Neymar
results.description: Santos have dismissed reports suggesting a lack of transparency from their medical staff regarding Neymar's physical condition and believe the player will be ready to play at the World Cup.

results.title: Source: Silva a 'real option' for Barcelona
results.description: Bernardo Silva is a "real option" for Barcelona, sources have told ESPN, as the Spanish champions' remarkable start to the summer transfer window continues.

results.title: Pérez: Madrid need 'good coach' amid Mou links
results.description: Florentino Pérez has insisted that Real Madrid just need "a good coach" to get back to their best -- adding that José Mourinho fits into that category -- saying the current team is good enough to see in "another very important era in Real Madrid history."

results.title: Sources: Konaté set to leave Liverpool for free
results.description: Ibrahima Konaté is set to leave Liverpool on a free transfer this summer, sources have told ESPN.

results.title: Martinez: Ronaldo could play at 2030 World Cup
results.description: Portugal coach Roberto Martinez has said "no one" should doubt that Cristiano Ronaldo could feature at the 2030 World Cup when he will be 45-years-old.
